title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 534.100 - Return of officer
text:
534.100.  Return of officer. — The officer shall, on or before the trial day, return the summons and certify thereon, or annex thereto, how he executed it.
(RSMo 1939 § 2839) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 2453; 1919 § 3001; 1909 § 7663
